overall.description: Gameplay footage from Red Dead Redemption 2 showing a character driving a horse-drawn carriage through rural American prairie landscape. The journey begins on rocky terrain near oak trees, crosses open grasslands where another rider is passed, and descends into a canyon toward a river with willow trees.

scene_state.functional_zone: open grassland with scattered oak trees

agents.ego_description: driving a horse-drawn carriage along a dirt path through grassland, departing from a rocky area with large oak trees

entered.detail: mature oak tree with dense green canopy at the starting position
expansive golden-green grassland stretching to the horizon
hazy blue mountain range visible on the horizon
uneven rocky terrain with scattered boulders at the path's edge

segments.scene_description: The segment opens with a horse-drawn carriage departing from a rocky area with a prominent oak tree. The camera follows from behind as the carriage moves onto a dirt path cutting through expansive grasslands, with distant mountains visible under a clear afternoon sky.

scene_state.functional_zone: open prairie approaching rocky mesa formations

events.description: a rider on a white horse passes by on the right side of the path traveling in the opposite direction

agents.ego_description: continuing along the dirt path through open grassland, passing a rider on a white horse

notable_agents.action: riding a white horse in the opposite direction, passing the carriage on the right side of the path

entered.detail: large red-rock mesa formations rising on the right horizon

segments.scene_description: The carriage travels through open prairie as large rocky mesa formations become visible on the right horizon. Around the 22-second mark, a rider on a white horse passes by in the opposite direction. The terrain remains grassy with scattered trees, and the mesas grow larger as the carriage approaches.

scene_state.functional_zone: canyon descent toward river with willow trees

events.description: the path descends into a canyon revealing a river and dense willow trees ahead

agents.ego_description: driving the carriage down a sloping path into a canyon area toward a river with willow trees

entered.detail: calm river water visible at the bottom of the canyon descent
weeping willow trees with drooping branches lining the riverbank
steep rocky canyon walls rising on both sides of the path

segments.scene_description: The carriage descends into a canyon as the landscape transitions from open prairie to an enclosed river valley. Rocky formations now flank both sides of the path, and willow trees become prominent near the water's edge. The lighting becomes slightly diffused as the canyon walls cast shadows over the descending trail.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement from a rocky woodland clearing through expansive prairies and into a shadowed river canyon. It begins behind a horse-drawn carriage departing from a prominent oak tree, moving onto a dirt path that cuts through wide grasslands under a clear afternoon sky. As the carriage travels further, the open terrain reveals large rocky mesa formations on the horizon and a rider on a white horse passing in the opposite direction. The scene then shifts as the path descends from the prairie into an enclosed valley, where the landscape is flanked by towering rocky walls. Finally, the lighting becomes diffused under the canyon's shadows as the carriage approaches the water's edge lined with willow trees.
